items.title: Why rising healthcare spending is a sign of economic failure, not growth
items.summary: Every new hospital bed added to our infrastructure is not an achievement but a sign that we have failed at the primary job of keeping people healthy. We need to move from volume...

items.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
items.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

items.title: Apple’s Camera Chief Thinks AI Can Give You Superpowers
items.summary: The generative features in iOS 27’s new Photos app will add fake pixels to some of your shots, but Apple’s Jon McCormack says the company isn’t using AI “for the sake of AI.”
